Earring of Twisted Leaves  
 

Lore Item
Slot: EAR
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 2
WIS: +1 HP: +35 MANA: +35
Effect: Scale of Wolf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 4.5) at Level 49
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Earring of Twisted Leaves
Lore Item
Slot: EAR
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 2
WIS: +1 HP: +35 MANA: +35
Effect: Scale of Wolf (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 4.5) at Level 49
WT: 0.5 Size: SMALL
Class: DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 3 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:540
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 05:13:28
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 899pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Chardok
NPC Name
Watch Captain Hir`roul

Zone Name
Chardok

Post Comment
stupid
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2004 at 11:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1717373788612
View User Forum
Scholar
485 posts
this and the earring of woven bark should be for every class OTHER than the ones who can already cast its effect. its pointless after they get a better buff or snare sure it saves mana but its obsolete after they get a better spell. at least other classes would get some use out of it. damn...
heh a monk that wishes he could cast snare
▲ Page top
RE: stupid
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2004 at 11:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255270711
152 posts
A) Scale of Wolf is not SOW! it is nothing like sow other thing the fact it makes ur run faster. For those who don't know scale of wolf is alot faster then sow but if u get hit 1 time it gets knocked off u much like selo's song of travel for bards.

B) Even if it was sow for only those that can cause it saving mana isn't the reason for having it. The reason for having it is it saves a buff slot leaving room for another dot or nuke to be scribed.

QuoteReply

I am having a fabulous night in the bazaar, I just picked this up for 340pp! It dam well better work on my 52 Druid too! LOL ;-)

hey guys i have all my druids spells printed and i see that at a earlier lvl you get spell and at a later lvl you get spell upgrade so this earring must proc somewhere in 50's

RE: Not BL usable
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2003 at 8:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260593827
24 posts
That's because Beastlords don't get the Scale of Wolf spell period. They get SoW, yes, but not Scale of Wolf, which is faster but breaks when you attack something or cast a spell.

unfair
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2003 at 11:15 AM Rating: Decent
Aleahna
Scholar
25 posts
I am 32 Druid, and have had this for awhile. I already have the spell, and it totally sucks that I cant access the spell via the earring! Not fair Verant to make us wait for the effect when we have the spell!

"I live my life with hope, always hope, that the future will be better than the present, but only as long as I work to make it so." -quote from Drizzt Do-Urden of the 'Forgotten Realms' saga by R.A. Salvatore .

# Aug 18 2002 at 8:17 PM Rating: Decent

Can this be cast on others? Or is it self only?

# Nov 20 2002 at 8:54 PM Rating: Decent

▲ Page top
Not worth as much as it could be
QuoteReply
# May 13 2002 at 11:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775160804
Scholar
72 posts
A friend of mine just bought this for 200 on Luclin. Since the only people that can wear it can already cast the spell at level 34 (except BL not sure when they get it) it just saves a slot and some mana. If it's not insta cast I don't see it worth more than 200 because it's just a convinience item that people can do without if they don't want to pay for the item. And the stats for a level 49, when the item is clickable, are pretty low. Now, if it was insta cast SoW all/all I think the price would be insane!
▲ Page top
RE: Not worth as much as it could be
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2002 at 8:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250645882
19 posts
Well I bought one for 2k yesterday, and although I'm happy with the price, I am dissapointed that I will not be able to use the spell on it for 5 more levels. I was hoping so much that it would work at level 45. *sighs*

Regardless, it frees up a gem, and I travel so much getting people to and fro or just getting tradeskill supplies, that I will want to use this item. Also, in a pinch, Scale of Wolf overwrites SoW if you get in trouble and need an extra boost of speed. I can already anticipate using it. :)
*Run-run-run* Ack! Not fast enough! *stop* *twist left* *hotkey click* *Zoom!* Heh.

I still think it should be usable at level 45 though! *grumps*
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2002 at 3:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775935205
184 posts
is this the rigth price 1k? is so i want one anybody that sellinf one on lanys send a tell to carpina also do you need wolf scales for this?
thanks
▲ Page top
RE: price
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2002 at 12:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591750465643
23 posts
You need to be level 50 to use this item. And there is no component to use this effect, it's the same as casting it.

scale of wolf
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2001 at 6:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770528961
257 posts

to those who think that scale of wolf is useless try being a barbarian shm and having to run from e commons to halas scale is a big improvement over sow trust me. i definatelly want one and either earring of cleansig or purity atm i dont wear earrings. picky on what i get. still sitting at 190 wis none the less. now if only we could use those snare earrings us shms would be king :)

Singdarra 30 bard
Kaldalina 51 mystic
Sirorion 30 warrior

All on the Tribunal
▲ Page top
Convenience
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 8:39 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591771047867
9 posts
You run places a lot... all the time you're not in the process of PLing or getting exp for yourself... with this its not a hastle at all to wear and scale yourself every time you cast a spell. You never have to mem it -- just stick the spell in the back of your spellbook with your lowbie/useless spells.

QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 6:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570540506
10 posts
Does anyone know the area this guy spawns in? Is it in the front fort or further in?
▲ Page top
More info
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 4:43 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361787811
1 post
This item isn't clickable until level 49. It didn't work on my 48 druid, but did at 49.

The cast time seems to be very similar to the normal scale wolf spell. I think it's a very useful item for quick travelling through zones - if you don't have a bard with you, of course! :-)
▲ Page top
I tried this on
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 9:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770584410
Scholar
16 posts
Some one in EC was selling this and I decided to try before buy. I gave an ooc that I had his earing and would return it before witnesses. I put it on and started running with sow. I stoped and cast. Loong cast time but it overwrote my sow and I took of and was halling but. Beleave me it is way faster than sow. I did not see the 35 mana but only the 35 hp and +1 wis so i opted not to buy. Neither of us knew what it was worth. I realy should have bought it. I use Scale all the time when traveling. It doesnt drop when you zone just when you cast.
▲ Page top
What is Scale of wolf?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 7:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759370053
24 posts
What is scale of wolf? I had the spell so all i know is its a lvl 52 shaman spell (sold it fer 150pp on saryryn) so I was just wondering what this effect does. Is it similar to SOW and spirit of the cheetah? Or is it a buff like Spirit of the Monkey and Hippo(is that it?, spirit of the Hippo? Soandso gains the weight of a Hippopatamus... :)

▲ Page top
RE: What is Scale of wolf?
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2001 at 11:56 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591769899116
Scholar
19 posts
- Spirit of Wolf :
Classes: Rng(L30) Dru(L14) Shm(L9) Bst(L30)
Increase Movement between 34% (L9) to 55% (L50)
Spell Duration: 360 ticks (36 minutes)
Casting Time: 4.50 seconds
Note: Shamans in one of their EPIC Step , receive some Boots with a Self Instant SoW Effect


- Scale of Wolf (aka The SoW for Travel):
Classes: Dru(L29) Shm(L24)
Increase Movement between 57% (L24) to 70% (L50)
Negate if you start to Combat or Cast (Note: dont negate if you are attacked, only if you attack)
Spell Duration: 450 ticks (45 minutes)
Casting Time: 4.50 seconds
FOR THIS EARRING Casting Time: (i have it) it seems to be the same of the spell

- Spirit of Cheetah (aka The SoW for Escape):

Classes: Dru(L24) Shm(L24)
Increase Movement between 99% (L24) to 115% (L40)
Spell Duration: 8 ticks (48 seconds)
Casting Time: 0.50 seconds
Recast Delay: 10 minutes


- Journeyman and Traveler Boots Effect
Increase Movement by 35% (L1)
Spell Duration: 180 ticks (18.0 minutes)


Note: ALL this effects have a Casting Area Restriction: Outdoor
▲ Page top
RE: What is Scale of wolf?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 11:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752959556
5 posts
Scale of the Wolf is a level 29 Druid spell. It is faster than SoW, but if you attack or cast a spell it drops and you have nothing for speed.
I dont know if Shamans get this...

I think you are talking about :

Spirit of Scale Upgrade to Spirit of Wolf Group +70% speed. This is a Druid and Shaman spell. Level 53 for druids.
▲ Page top
RE: What is Scale of wolf?
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 11:55 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965874600
View User Forum
Sage
268 posts
Spirit of Scale (53 dru, 52 shm) also wears off when you attack or cast a spell.
▲ Page top
To put it in perspective
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2001 at 12:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761453921
Scholar
45 posts
Once you have 200 wisdom, each additional wisdom point is worth 5 mana. So this is the equivalent of an 8 wisdom earring with 2AC, 35 hit points, and an awesome right click spell. (I have my epic shaman boots and neither they NOR my self-cast SoW are close to being as fast as Scale of Wolf).

Worth more than an Ivandyr's Hoop, that's for sure.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 12 2001 at 6:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hmm..
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 13 2001 at 2:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Not everyone can be ubber like you, you say
not junk
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 10:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760005684
15 posts
I beg to differ ;) the scale of wolf is much more likly to save your life than SoW, there are many things that will out-run you with SoW scale of wolf is considerbly faster. I'll let you off with the outside usage cos using Scale to kite ain't exactly a smart thing to do ;). But the stats aren't that bad, I would much rather have this than a forest loop as mana is much better to have than lots of wis gear IMO and HP is always a handy thing to have around. Good item that could be better but I definatly wouldn't mind one on my ear.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 12 2001 at 11:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey Linken=) Remeber me? =)
RE: not junk
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 10:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760005684
15 posts
You'll have to refresh my memory, I'll try and give you a tell sometime on EQ
▲ Page top
Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 2:31 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249475779
Scholar
148 posts
Let's see, Scale of Wolf drops if you cast a spell or attack (but not if you are attacked). Spirit of Wolf has a speed bonus depending upon the level (not sure if caster or recipient), and Scale is supposed to be faster than Spirit. However, at level 45, performing speed trials (cross West karana with Spirit one way and Scale the other), I can see no difference between Scale and Spirit. I can race a person 5 levels above me with Spirit, and they pass me all the time.

I guess I will give one to my druid alt and see what level one needs to be to click on it. Time will tell the value of this item, but I predict it will be at least the value of a black sapphire earring.
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 9:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361715796
51 posts
That's a rather strange statement, considering that it gives 10 more hps and the same mana as the gold BS earring and 10 more mana and the same hps as the electrum BS earring, in addition to 2 AC and 1 wis, and a rightclickable spell that you don't have to mem or waste mana on. So how you managed to figure out that this is less valuable than something with lower stats, I don't know.
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 6:16 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
right click doesnt really matter when the spell isnt useful...
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 1:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965846855
151 posts
Scale of Wolf *is* faster than SoW, noticably so. Sure, the effect isn't the end all be all, but its a handy traveling spell (West Karana or the Dreadlands, anyone?) and it saves you from having to med it.

So what's the beef?
▲ Page top
Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 2:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750106032
View User Forum
Scholar
221 posts
Scale of wolf.. a potential safe escape without having to mess with saving a slot for a 15 minute recycle time spell....

and mages get to summon a stacck of water...

Anyone else think there is a ***** going on here?
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 2:30 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762977716
25 posts
You're thinking of Spirit of Cheetah. Scale of Wolf is trash, I've never once used that spell. Our other earring has the effect of level 1 snare, you have no room to complain, really.

Morb, 59 Preserver
Silyana, 54 Disciple
Rallos Zek
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 10:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758061644
185 posts
If you have never once used the spell, how do you know it's trash? Granted it has a very specific use, and is useless in any type of combat situation. But when you want to go to qeynos, or cross Overthere, or any other long run through an area you wont be fighting in, this spell is great. Personally, i use it all the time for travel. ex: Port to NK, cast scale of wolf (SCoW), and save a bunch of time on the trip to Qeynos/Halas/Permafrost.

Now with this earing, I could see using it as an escape device, depending on the casting time. Assuming you dont want to use an evac spell for some reason like if there are no nearby rings to get back quickly. Map it to a hotkey, click off SoW, hit SCoW, and run like hell. VI changed it a while back so it doens't drop if you get hit anymore, only if YOU cast or attack.
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 3:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251657774
1 post
What's wrong with click effect of lv 1 snare? i see that as being a lot more usefull than either everfount or scale of wolf... as long as the click effect doesn't have a long casting time, it'll just go to save u a spell slot... give a click effect to an enchante that casts mez or some mundane spell and he'll be happy, just think of all the times they have to switch spells mid battle... VI is just running out of ideas... since there will be horses implemented with luclin, i think what VI needs to do is to add an upgrade to horses : LLAMAS
i ask you to answer my question please, what could be funnier than a dwarf riding a llama?
and did anyone see the new screenshots and think ogres just look stupid now? they dont look cool and funny anymore, they dont have flat funny looking grinnin faces, they just look like barbarians who got hooked on steroids... haha n/m they look like abobo from double dragon... and OMG gnomes look like mini-me... they dont look sinister and quietly evil... and why are there no screenshots of DWARVES ?!?!?!
i hope and pray that VI is just holding back the screenshots of dwarves cuz they're taking extra time to add detail and genious to the character models of the supreme race... dwarves better still be damn sexy or the whole red light district in Kaladim will go bankrupt and the economy of all of Faydwer will perish


"How do you do Nothing?" asked Pooh.
"Well, it's when people call out at you just as you're going off to do it, `What are you going to do, Christopher Robin?' and you say, `Oh, nothing' and then you go and do it. It means just going along, listening to all the things you can't hear, and not bothering."
▲ Page top
RE: Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245555079
17 posts
What's wrong with click effect of lvl 1 snare, you ask? Just that snare has like a 2-3 min duration...at the level needed to obtain this item, all the druids will have Ensnare, which lasts about 10 min (awesome) and for only 35 mana. On the other hand, everyone seems to be skipping over the fact that this earring is great for shamans :)
▲ Page top
Nice
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2001 at 2:04 PM Rating: Decent

3 posts
This could be a nice item depending on the casting time.
